title: Anchoring
description: Agent Passport Standard v0.2 — anchoring receipt, verification, provider schemas, and well-known providers.

tx_hash.description: Transaction hash on the anchoring layer.

provider.description: Provider identifier. Well-known values: 'base-sepolia', 'base-mainnet', 'ethereum-mainnet', 'arweave-mainnet', 'clawchain-420420'. Custom providers use the format '<network>-<chainId>'.

exists.description: Whether the hash was found on the anchoring layer.

name.description: Provider identifier string used in AnchorReceipt.provider.

chain_id.description: EVM chain ID (0 for non-EVM providers).

type.description: Anchoring layer type. Use 'ethereum' for all EVM-compatible chains including private PoA.

rpc.description: RPC endpoint URL (optional, for documentation purposes).

WellKnownProviders.description: Registry of well-known APS anchoring providers.

examples.name: base-sepolia
examples.description: Base Sepolia testnet — recommended for APS development and staging.

examples.name: base-mainnet
examples.description: Base mainnet — recommended for APS production deployments.

examples.name: ethereum-mainnet
examples.description: Ethereum mainnet — highest security, highest cost.

examples.name: clawchain-420420
examples.description: CLAWChain — APS reference implementation. Private Clique PoA blockchain on ClawBotDen k3s cluster. Demonstrates full APS Memory Vault (§11) + Anchoring (§4) integration. Contract: AgentMemoryVault at 0xB8423ACDEdf5f446A6e00860bCBadF7987cD55b8. See: docs/clawchain-provider.md

examples.name: noop
examples.description: No-op provider — for testing and environments without blockchain access.
